fresh_facts.claim: A two-week US-Iran ceasefire was announced on April 8, 2026, mediated by Pakistan, marking a significant diplomatic development in the region.
US President Donald Trump warned of 'unprecedented force' and 'shooting starts' if Iran violates the ceasefire or nuclear deal terms.
Vice President JD Vance is scheduled to lead US talks with Iran in Islamabad, Pakistan, on Saturday during ceasefire negotiations.
The Pentagon reports destruction of 80% of Iran's air defenses, 90% of its navy fleet, and 95% of naval mines prior to the ceasefire.
Israel conducted large-scale strikes in Lebanon targeting Hezbollah on Wednesday but ceased fire against Iran per directives.
fresh_facts.source: Israeli military sources and news reports

fresh_facts.claim: Iran activated air defenses in Tehran and Alborz province approximately 7:30 p.m. local time on April 9, 2026, with sirens and anti-aircraft fire reported.
fresh_facts.source: Iranian news reports and local accounts

fresh_facts.claim: The IRGC aerospace commander warned Israel to halt Lebanon strikes, stating Israel will 'regret' strikes as regional ceasefire violations.
Iran's Supreme National Security Council warned of a 'full force' response to ceasefire errors or violations.
Iran's 10-point peace proposal demands US combat force withdrawal from the region, lifting of all sanctions, and ending attacks on the 'Axis of Resistance'.
fresh_facts.source: Iranian Foreign Ministry and Pakistani mediation reports

fresh_facts.claim: Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi confirmed Iran's halt of defensive operations if attacks cease.
Pro-Iran factions in Iraq announced a matching two-week halt to regional attacks on Wednesday in coordination with the US-Iran ceasefire.
Reza Pahlavi urged Iran's military to rise against the regime and IRGC, citing mass killings and national ruin.
Over 700 arrests have been made since late June 2025 focused on Tehran, Kurdish, and border areas as part of post-conflict repression.
The IRGC and Basij have conducted raids, set up checkpoints, performed phone inspections, and fatal shootings have occurred including two men near Hamedan on July 2.
fresh_facts.source: Fars News and Iran Human Rights Organization

fresh_facts.claim: Iran Human Rights Organization warned on Wednesday of ramped-up repression to cover military failures and prevent protests.
The ceasefire agreement requires Iran to ensure 'COMPLETE, IMMEDIATE, and SAFE OPENING' of the Strait of Hormuz for shipping.
Trump reportedly urged Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu to scale back Lebanon operations to avoid derailing US-Iran ceasefire talks.
fresh_facts.source: News reports citing US official sources

fresh_facts.claim: The ceasefire temporarily reopened the Strait of Hormuz but does not address core US demands or Iran's calls for sanction relief.
No confirmed new strikes or direct military confrontations between US/Israel and Iran occurred in the 24 hours following ceasefire announcement.
Iran reports incidents on Lavan Island and a drone downed in Fars province as ceasefire violations by Israel.

regime_fall.current_status: The two-week ceasefire is actively strained with both sides accusing violations: Iran activated air defenses on April 9, reported Israeli strikes on Lavan Island and a downed drone, while Israel continues Lebanon operations despite US pressure to scale back. Vice President Vance is leading US negotiations in Islamabad on April 11, but fundamental disagreements persist over Strait of Hormuz access, sanctions relief, and the scope of regional commitments.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Iran activated air defenses in Tehran and Alborz province on April 9, 2026, and reported Israeli military violations including strikes on Lavan Island and a downed drone, signaling potential ceasefire breakdown despite diplomatic talks scheduled for April 11.
